creator: root@ai1.alaska.net
text:
Lost bootblocks on attached 32MB USB/SD card/drive, lost bootblocks on 60GB ATA primary master drive (while installing on slave).

Fix: 

Best determination is that the 9.1 install CD writes bootblocks to attached drives on a system, other than the drive it is actually committed to being installed upon.
How-To-Repeat: 	Do not know exactly.  It is only known that no commitment was made to install on any drive other than the slave ATA 40GB drive, yet after installation, bootblocks were replaced on all other attached drives, rendering them unmountable with corrupted filesystems.
